payload.answer: Extracted 3 atomic, durable memory cards: (1) durable source evidence is required for AI memory systems; (2) atomic cards should be small and traceable; (3) semantic index may improve recall, while the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

entity_resolution.reason: No explicit entity identifiers are provided in the source text beyond generic concepts.

payload.intent: Extract atomic, durable memory cards with traceable, evidence-aligned statements from the provided text.

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

details: Parsed three distinct statements and converted each into an atomic card.

repair_options: Add source citations/quote spans if available to strengthen traceability and durability requirements.
